set.body: New JVM-only sbt module (e.g. parity/) with Breeze 2.1.0 as a TEST-scope dependency (core stays Breeze-free per PRD constraints). Same inputs through gale and Breeze, tolerance-based result comparison: dense (gemm, gemv, solve, LU/QR/Cholesky, det, conditionEstimate), banded, sparse ops, and spectral as phase-a lands (eigSymmetric vs Breeze eigSym, partial SVD vs svd). Eigenvector comparisons must be sign/phase-aware and subspace-based for degenerate/clustered eigenvalues. GOAL: nearly equivalent numerical results vs Breeze across the shared surface. vendor/breeze checkout is reference-reading only, not a dependency.
